seed_rate.notes: 15-20 kg/ha for Kharif sowing; Zaid (summer) sowing requires 25 kg/ha.

sowing.soil_conditions: Well-drained sandy loam soils with pH 6.0-7.0.

irrigation.notes: Ensure light soil moisture. Excess water restricts nodulation.
Avoid dry conditions during pod expansion.

fertilizer.notes: Nitrogen requirement is minimal. Apply P for active rooting.

maturity_indicators: More than 80% of pods turn dark brown or black
harvest.harvest_method: Hand picking of pods (multiple pickings) or cutting stems
harvest.notes: Sun-dry pods for 2-3 days before manual threshing to minimize storage insects.
